intro: The US is negotiating voluntary standards for releasing advanced AI models, building on Trump's June executive order aimed at guiding how companies develop frontier systems. OpenAI has proposed giving the Trump administration a 5% stake to ease Washington pressure, following the president's earlier suggestion that government ownership in AI giants would benefit the public. Microsoft committed $2.5 billion and 6,000 employees to a new AI implementation unit, joining Amazon, OpenAI, and Anthropic in forming dedicated deployment divisions to help customers adopt the technology.
